arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho has already sent Enzo Maresca clear message amid Chelsea transfer talks
arts.sum: There is no guarantee that Chelsea do make a move for the 20-year-old winger, but he is one of several players in that position the club are interested in. arts.ttl: Chelsea hijack Arsenal transfer plan to sign William Saliba backup after worrying injury update
arts.sum: Chelsea appear to have dented Arsenal's hopes of finding a replacement for William Saliba, who was forced to miss the Gunners' clash against Aston Villa. "He wasn’t feeling good enough to play so we have to assess the situation," added Arteta.
